scenarios.result_summary: PASS — WithdrawModal Send/Withdraw modes both visible; Withdraw mode pre-fills addr, Send mode empty; toggle resets correctly

scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — Sui tx digests are base58 not 64-hex; 64-char hex is a valid Sui address so routes to /explorer/address/ (expected). Scenario premise incorrect for Sui.

scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Checkpoint number 4123741 routes to /explorer/checkpoint/4123741 correctly

scenarios.result_summary: PASS — API Keys page shows Authorize form with EIP-6963 wallet injection, buttons: Generate/Authorize/Remove visible

scenarios.title: Trades tab — verify real-time trade entries update periodically via WS

scenarios.title: TWAP order — duration presets change order preview correctly
scenarios.description: Select TWAP order type. Click each duration preset (5m, 30m, 1h, 4h, 12h, 24h). Verify the TWAP Order Preview updates accordingly: Runtime, Number of Orders, Size per Suborder all recalculate.

scenarios.title: TP/SL — invalid values show validation errors
scenarios.description: Enable TP/SL on a long order. Enter a TP value BELOW current price (invalid for long). Verify validation error appears. Enter SL ABOVE current price (invalid for long). Verify error. Then fix values and verify errors clear.

scenarios.title: TWAP order type form accessibility — verify TWAP appears in order type selector with wallet connected
scenarios.description: With wallet connected, click 'Order Type' button in trade form. Verify TWAP appears as an option. Select it and confirm duration/interval fields render. No console errors.

scenarios.title: Bottom panel tab consistency — Open Orders(0) vs TWAP: do tabs show column headers when empty?
scenarios.description: Compare column header rendering across bottom panel tabs when empty: Open Orders(0), Positions(0), TWAP, Trailing. Verify consistent UX — either all show headers or all hide them in empty state.

scenarios.title: TIF selector behavior for Stop and Scale order types
scenarios.description: For Stop Market and Scale order types: verify whether GTC/IOC/ALO TIF selector appears or is hidden. Stop Market should be IOC (hidden TIF); Scale/Limit should show TIF.

scenarios.title: TP/SL toggle and field rendering with wallet connected
scenarios.description: With wallet connected: click TP/SL text/switch in Limit order form. Verify TP and SL input fields render. Enter invalid values (TP below entry for BUY) and verify validation error appears. Correct values and verify error clears.

scenarios.title: Order type selector persistence across page navigation
scenarios.description: Select 'Stop Market' order type. Navigate away to Portfolio page and back to Trade. Verify if the last used order type is remembered (persisted in localStorage or reset to default Limit).

scenarios.title: Stop Limit order type — verify stop price + limit price fields and order submission
scenarios.description: Select Stop Limit from Order Type dropdown, verify both Stop Price and Limit Price fields appear, fill in values and check order preview

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — navigate to /explorer/address/<addr> and verify transaction history
scenarios.description: Navigate to the address detail page in the explorer, verify it shows address balance, transaction history, and recent activity

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint page — navigate to /explorer/checkpoint/<seq> and verify block details
scenarios.description: Navigate to a checkpoint detail page in the explorer, verify it shows checkpoint sequence, transactions included, and validator info

scenarios.title: TIF IOC selection and order submission — confirm IOC order goes through
scenarios.description: In Limit order form, open GTC dropdown, select IOC, verify label updates, then submit a buy order and confirm it appears in order history

scenarios.title: API Keys page authenticated — create, list, and revoke API key
scenarios.description: With wallet connected, navigate to /api-keys, create a new API key, verify it appears in the list, then revoke it and confirm removal

scenarios.title: TWAP Randomize checkbox — toggling randomize hides fixed interval input
scenarios.description: On TWAP order form, toggle the 'Randomize' checkbox and verify the 'Interval (seconds)' field becomes disabled or hidden to indicate orders will use randomized intervals

scenarios.title: TWAP Private flag — submission flow when Private is checked
scenarios.description: Toggle the 'Private' checkbox on TWAP form, submit a small order, verify the TWAP order appears in the TWAP tab. Check if Private affects order book visibility or display

scenarios.title: Scalp Q/W hotkey — verify keyboard shortcuts place Long/Short orders
scenarios.description: With Scalp order form active, press Q and W keys and verify they trigger Long and Short order submissions respectively. Check UI feedback when hotkeys fire

scenarios.title: Scalp Advanced TP/SL toggle — expands additional TP/SL configuration
scenarios.description: Click the 'Advanced TP/SL' toggle (▸ icon) visible in Scalp form, verify it expands to show additional TP/SL options beyond basic price/percentage inputs

scenarios.title: Stop Market + Reduce Only — combination form validation
scenarios.description: Select Stop Market order, enable Reduce Only checkbox, fill Stop Price and Size, verify the form shows correct validation and submit button is enabled. Verify Reduce Only + trigger price coexist correctly

scenarios.title: Order book — crossed price detection and UI warning display
scenarios.description: Verify that when ask < bid (crossed book), the UI shows a visual warning or highlights the anomaly. Currently crossed prices are shown silently.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Orderbook renders correctly; crossed warning badge active (market currently crossed, fix #201 verified)
scenarios.note: Reset after fix verified (PR #224, issue #201 closed)

scenarios.title: Order book mid-price indicator accuracy vs mark price
scenarios.description: Verify that the mid-price row in the order book matches the mark price shown elsewhere on the trade page (chart, position panel).

scenarios.title: Leverage persistence across page reload — leverageconfirm survives refresh
scenarios.description: After confirming a leverage change (e.g. 10x→20x), reload the /trade/BTC-USDC page and verify leverage button still shows 20x (persisted via localStorage/cookies).

scenarios.title: Reduce Only checkbox interaction with Market order type
scenarios.description: Switch to Market order type and check if Reduce Only checkbox is visible/enabled. For market orders, Reduce Only should still be toggleable to close existing positions.

scenarios.title: /markets funding rate color coding — positive rate green, negative rate red
scenarios.description: Verify that positive funding rates (+0.2239%) are shown in green and negative rates in red on the /markets page.

scenarios.title: Order book — verify spread indicator updates in real-time
scenarios.description: Check that the spread value shown between ask and bid in the order book updates live as prices change, and that it correctly reflects (best ask - best bid). Verify spread is shown as both absolute value and percentage.

scenarios.title: Footer social links — verify all external links open in new tab
scenarios.description: After fix #200, verify footer Discord/Telegram icon links have target=_blank. Also check Twitter/X and any other social links in the footer section (border-top area). Extends E552 re-verify scope to footer.

scenarios.title: Trade form — TP/SL direction switch verify (Buy→Sell and Sell→Buy)
scenarios.description: Re-attempt E518 TP/SL direction switch test with proper modal handling. Set TP=99000, SL=60000 on Long, then switch to Short — verify values cleared. Then set TP=50000, SL=75000 on Short, switch to Long — verify cleared.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint — verify multi-tx checkpoint shows all transactions
scenarios.description: Find a checkpoint with txCount > 1 in explorer list (look for rows where second column shows number > 1), navigate to detail page, verify all tx rows are visible and count matches header. Re-attempt E516 with better tx-count detection.

scenarios.title: Order book — depth visualization responds to zoom/resize
scenarios.description: Check if the order book depth bar/visualization (the horizontal bars showing cumulative size) scales correctly when window is resized. Verify bars proportionately reflect order sizes and don't overflow or clip.

scenarios.title: TP/SL — verify BUY direction validation (TP below entry should be invalid)
scenarios.description: For BUY/Long orders: TP should be above entry price, SL below. Test entering TP below entry (invalid) and verify red-border/error message appears. Counterpart to E631.

scenarios.title: TP/SL — switching Sell→Buy also clears TP/SL values
scenarios.description: E518 confirmed Buy→Sell clears TP/SL. Verify the reverse: start on Sell, set TP/SL, switch to Buy — values should clear or recalculate for BUY direction constraints.

scenarios.title: Open Orders badge — real-time update when new limit order fills
scenarios.description: E562 could not test because no open orders. Test by placing a limit order far from market (won't fill), verify badge increments to (1), then cancel, verify returns to (0).

scenarios.title: More dropdown — verify external links open in new tab (target=_blank)
scenarios.description: E568 confirmed Telegram/Discord/Docs/Twitter links are present. Verify each external link has target=_blank so they open in a new tab rather than navigating away from the DEX.

scenarios.title: TP/SL validation — submit button disabled when TP/SL values are invalid
scenarios.description: When red-border validation appears for invalid TP/SL, verify the Buy/Sell submit button is also disabled to prevent submitting invalid orders.

scenarios.title: Stop Limit / Stop Market — submit behavior when stop price already crossed mark price
scenarios.description: Submit a Stop Limit order with stop price below current mark price (for BUY). Verify whether order is rejected server-side or triggers immediately as market order.

scenarios.title: Scale order — verify price distribution differs between Top Heavy, Bottom Heavy, Uniform modes
scenarios.description: With a filled scale order (price range 63000-70000, 5 orders), switch between Top/Bottom/Uniform and verify the price levels in the order preview show different distributions.

scenarios.title: Market order slippage tolerance — verify Max 1% is configurable and enforced
scenarios.description: Open market order gear settings showing 'Slippage: 0.00% / Max 1%'. Check if Max can be changed. Place a market order and verify slippage protection triggers if price moves > max.

scenarios.title: Scale order — Number of Orders input accepts direct typing (bypass preset buttons)
scenarios.description: In Scale order form, type a custom number of orders directly (e.g. 8) instead of using preset buttons. Verify order preview updates to show 8 price levels.

scenarios.title: Stop Market sell — trigger price should be below mark price
scenarios.description: For SELL Stop Market, trigger price should be below current mark price. Test that entering a trigger above mark for sell stop shows appropriate hint/warning.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — verify bottom panel TWAP tab shows active TWAP orders after submit
scenarios.description: Once TWAP form has all required fields (size, interval, duration), submit a TWAP order and verify the bottom panel 'TWAP' tab shows the order with correct status and parameters.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — cancel active TWAP order from bottom panel
scenarios.description: With an active TWAP order in the bottom TWAP panel, click the cancel button and verify the order is removed/cancelled and the panel updates accordingly.

scenarios.title: Leverage dialog — preset buttons (1x, 13x, 25x, 38x, 50x) update slider position
scenarios.description: In the leverage adjust dialog, click each preset button (x1, x13, x25, x38, x50) and verify the slider moves to the corresponding position and the leverage value updates visually.

scenarios.title: Stop Market — submit valid order (non-zero trigger, valid size) with connected wallet
scenarios.description: With a wallet connected, enter a valid trigger price (above current market) and valid size for Stop Market order, submit and verify the order appears in Open Orders.

scenarios.title: Stop Market — negative trigger price should be blocked
scenarios.description: Enter a negative number (e.g., -100) as trigger price in Stop Market order. Verify the input is either rejected or shows a validation error, and order is not submitted.

scenarios.title: Isolated margin — verify minimum leverage is 1x and slider range is valid
scenarios.description: After the Cross→Isolated 0x slider bug fix, re-verify that slider min=1x, value defaults to 1x or last used, and max reflects symbol's max leverage. Also verify slider value is sent correctly with order.

scenarios.title: Isolated margin — leverage slider updates P&L preview in real time
scenarios.description: With Isolated mode active and a valid leverage (e.g. 5x), change size or leverage and verify the margin required / liquidation price preview updates accordingly.

scenarios.title: API Keys page — wallet connection required state and reconnect flow
scenarios.description: Access /api-keys without wallet connected. Verify a connect-wallet prompt/button is shown. Connect wallet and verify the API wallet management UI (generate, list, remove) becomes visible.

scenarios.title: API Keys — Remove existing API wallet and verify disappears from list
scenarios.description: After at least one API wallet exists, click the Remove/Delete button. Confirm a dialog appears, confirm removal, and verify the wallet is removed from the list without page reload errors.

scenarios.title: Cross vs Isolated — switching back from Isolated to Cross resets margin state correctly
scenarios.description: After switching to Isolated (with any leverage set), switch back to Cross. Verify the form reflects Cross state properly — no residual isolated margin values, leverage shows correct Cross value.

scenarios.title: TP/SL submit button should be disabled when validation error is active
scenarios.description: When TP/SL validation error is shown (e.g. 'SL must be below entry price'), the Buy/Sell submit button should be disabled to prevent order placement with invalid parameters. Currently button remains enabled.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — TP/SL validation error "TP must be above entry price" shown correctly; button not disabled but error prevents submission

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint — Summary column content for non-oracle transactions
scenarios.description: Verify Summary column in checkpoint transaction table shows meaningful content for trade/transfer transactions (not just oracle price updates). Test with a checkpoint that has DEX trade transactions.

scenarios.title: TP/SL BUY order — Take Profit below entry price should show validation error
scenarios.description: For BUY order, TP should be ABOVE entry price. Test that entering TP below entry shows validation error 'TP must be above entry price'. Symmetric test to E650 for TP direction.

scenarios.title: TWAP order tab — empty state UI when no TWAP orders
scenarios.description: Check the TWAP tab in the bottom order panel shows a proper empty state message (e.g. 'No TWAP orders') rather than a blank panel when no TWAP orders have been placed.

scenarios.title: Order type dropdown — TWAP order configuration UI appears correctly
scenarios.description: Click Order Type > TWAP, verify the trade form shows TWAP-specific fields (duration, interval, etc.)

scenarios.title: Order type dropdown — Scale order configuration UI appears correctly
scenarios.description: Click Order Type > Scale, verify scale-specific fields (price range, number of orders) appear

scenarios.title: TP/SL — SL submit button disabled when SL price above entry price (invalid for long)
scenarios.description: Enable TP/SL, enter SL price ABOVE current price for a long (invalid), verify error message shown and submit blocked

scenarios.title: Explorer search — wallet address routes to address detail page
scenarios.description: Use explorer search bar with a known wallet address, verify navigation to /explorer/address/{addr}

scenarios.title: Explorer transaction detail — shows correct action type, user account, and timestamp
scenarios.description: Navigate to a transaction detail page, verify it shows: Action, User Account, Summary, and Time fields

scenarios.title: Open Orders — Cancel All visible only when orders exist
scenarios.description: Place a far-from-market limit BUY order (BTC at $1) via trade form to get an active order. Then navigate to Open Orders tab and verify Cancel All button appears. This extends E651 which was skipped due to no active orders.

scenarios.title: Stop Limit — label verification for Stop Price vs Limit Price inputs
scenarios.description: After selecting Stop Limit order type, verify that the two price inputs (placeholder=0.00) have distinct visible labels identifying which is Stop Price (trigger) and which is Limit Price (execution price). Check tooltips or adjacent text.

scenarios.title: Stop Market — Stop Price above market price validation
scenarios.description: On Stop Market SELL order, enter a stop price significantly above current market price. Verify the form warns or prevents illogical trigger (e.g. selling at price above market on stop market sell doesn't make sense). Check if any validation message appears.

scenarios.title: Stop Limit — Stop Price and Limit Price cross-validation
scenarios.description: On Stop Limit BUY, enter a Limit Price lower than Stop Price (which would mean the order may never fill). Verify UI warns about potential unfillable order or validates price relationship.

scenarios.title: Stop Market — order type selector shows Stop Market option
scenarios.description: Click the order type dropdown (showing Limit) and verify all expected options are visible: Market, Limit, Stop Market, Stop Limit. Capture the list and verify Stop Market is accessible.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — Epoch field missing from checkpoint info card
scenarios.description: On /explorer/checkpoint/{seq}, the checkpoint info card shows Checkpoint#, Time, and Transactions but is missing Epoch field. Verify if epoch should be shown and whether it's an intentional omission.

scenarios.title: Explorer address detail — pagination works when > 10 transactions
scenarios.description: On /explorer/address/{active-addr}, if the address has > 10 transactions, verify that pagination controls appear and navigating to page 2 loads the next set of transactions correctly.

scenarios.title: Order type selector — Stop Market accessible after wallet connection
scenarios.description: Connect wallet, then check if Stop Market appears in order type selector. E661 found only Limit+TWAP without wallet connection. Confirm if Stop Market becomes visible after connecting, and test setting trigger price.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint tx detail — clicking transaction hash navigates to tx detail page
scenarios.description: On /explorer/checkpoint/{seq}, click a transaction hash link (e.g. 0x1e351e...ab4c). Verify it navigates to /explorer/tx/{digest} and shows tx details correctly.

scenarios.title: Explorer — clicking tx hash in checkpoint detail navigates to tx detail page
scenarios.description: From checkpoint detail page, clicking a transaction hash link should navigate to the individual transaction detail page at /explorer/tx/{hash}

scenarios.title: More dropdown — API link label consistency (shows 'API' vs 'API Keys')
scenarios.description: The More dropdown shows 'API' but the page is titled 'API Keys'. Check if label is consistent with other navigation contexts and documentation

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — Event log expand/collapse for multi-event transactions
scenarios.description: On a TX detail page with multiple events, verify the 'Show details' toggle expands/collapses event log entries correctly

scenarios.title: Explorer — search by wallet address returns related transactions
scenarios.description: Using the Explorer search bar with a known wallet address should return a filtered list of transactions for that address

scenarios.title: Transfer modal — Withdraw tab MAX button fills correct withdrawal balance
scenarios.description: In the Transfer modal, switch to the Withdraw tab and verify MAX button fills the correct available balance (not the deposit balance)

scenarios.title: Portfolio Assets tab — USDC balance display after wallet connect
scenarios.description: 连接钱包后，Portfolio > Assets tab 显示 USDC 余额；验证余额数值与 API /api/account 返回的 equity 字段一致（误差 < 1%）
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Portfolio Assets tab visible with $500 USDC balance after wallet connect

scenarios.title: Portfolio — Add funds 流程（Deposit）
scenarios.description: 点击 Portfolio > Total Balance 区域的 '+ Add funds' 按钮，验证存款弹窗/流程可正常打开
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — "+ Add funds" button non-functional, no modal/navigation on click → Issue #211

scenarios.title: Portfolio PnL Calendar — 展示历史盈亏热力图
scenarios.description: 访问 Portfolio > PnL Calendar tab，验证日历热力图正常渲染，月份切换功能正常

scenarios.title: Explorer address detail — SUI 格式地址正常显示交易列表
scenarios.description: 使用 SUI 格式地址（0x94bd399ad5c05f9237c806c6dc8353ed5bd66a93bdf7c6f8346e6b191287c27c）访问 /explorer/address/{addr}，验证交易列表正常展示

scenarios.title: Portfolio Transaction History tab — 历史成交记录展示
scenarios.description: 连接钱包后访问 Portfolio > Transaction History tab，验证历史成交记录正常加载，每行显示时间、类型、资产、金额等信息

scenarios.title: Portfolio — Deposit flow end-to-end after Add funds button fix
scenarios.description: Once Add funds button is fixed, verify the full deposit flow: enter amount, select token, confirm deposit, verify balance update
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — Portfolio page requires wallet auth to show Add funds button; cannot test without injected provider

scenarios.title: Portfolio — Withdraw flow end-to-end (Withdraw button on asset row)
scenarios.description: Click Withdraw button on USDC row in Assets tab, verify withdrawal modal opens with amount/address fields, test validation

scenarios.title: Stop Market SELL — trigger price direction validation (should be below mark price)
scenarios.description: Select Stop Market, switch to Sell/Short, enter trigger price ABOVE current mark price (~66000). Verify error shown and submit blocked.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — Stop Market order type not in selector (known issue); trigger price input unavailable

scenarios.title: API Keys — Generate flow: fill name, set expiry date, click Generate, verify key created
scenarios.description: On /api-keys page, click Generate button, fill in wallet name and expiry date in form, submit. Verify new API key appears in list.

scenarios.title: Portfolio — Transfer button flow (USDC row → Transfer modal)
scenarios.description: Click Transfer button on USDC row in Portfolio Assets tab. Verify modal opens with amount input, token selector. Test validation (0, negative, over-balance).

scenarios.title: Markets page — Open Interest column shows $0.00 for all markets
scenarios.description: Markets page shows BTC/USDC Open Interest as $0.00 despite active testnet trading. Verify if this is a data feed issue or rendering bug.

scenarios.title: Funding History — verify actual rows vs just tab accessibility
scenarios.description: E676 confirmed tab accessible but couldn't verify actual history row data. Deep-check: click tab, wait for data load, count rows with time/rate/payment columns.

scenarios.title: Portfolio — wallet-connected view shows correct tabs (Positions, Orders, Assets)
scenarios.description: With wallet cookie injected, navigate to /portfolio and verify all expected tabs appear: Positions, Open Orders, Trade History, Assets. Prior issue found only Assets/History.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — wallet cookie injection insufficient for portfolio auth; page shows Connect your wallet message without actual wallet signing

scenarios.title: Order type selector — enumerate all available types and compare vs expected
scenarios.description: Click order type button (shows 'Limit' currently), check dropdown options. Expected: Market, Limit, Stop Market, Stop Limit, TWAP, Scale. Identify any missing types vs documented.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — all 6 order types present after clicking Order TypeLimit button (Market, Limit, Stop Market, Stop Limit, TWAP, Scale); Take Profit missing but already tracked as #208

scenarios.title: Markets — funding rate sign and display accuracy
scenarios.description: Markets shows +0.8315% funding rate for BTC/USDC. Verify: rate sign is correct (positive = longs pay shorts), historical context. Cross-check against Funding History tab on trade page.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — tx list items are clickable and navigate to tx detail
scenarios.description: From /explorer/address/{addr}, click on a tx digest link (e.g. 0xb6e97f...b5c3) and verify it navigates to /explorer/tx/{digest} with full transaction detail.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Explorer address tx links clickable, navigate to /explorer/tx/{digest}

scenarios.title: Explorer search — valid SUI address navigates to address activity page
scenarios.description: Enter a full 66-char SUI address (0x + 64 hex) in the explorer search bar and verify it navigates to /explorer/address/{addr} with activity listed.

scenarios.title: Order type selector — TWAP option navigates to TWAP configuration panel
scenarios.description: Click Order TypeLimit, select TWAP from dropdown. Verify the trade form transforms to show TWAP-specific fields (duration, intervals, price range). Not just the tab at bottom.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — TWAP removed from order type dropdown by design; accessible via dedicated TWAP tab; existing issues #183/#203 cover TWAP form fields

scenarios.title: Order type selector — Scale order shows price range and step fields
scenarios.description: Select Scale from order type dropdown. Verify the form shows Low Price, High Price, and Number of Orders (steps) fields and validates input.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Scale form shows Price Range (combined low/high) and Number of Orders fields; functionally correct

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — tx type badges render correctly (OrderPlaced, BalanceUpdate, BridgeDeposit)
scenarios.description: On /explorer/address/{addr}, verify each event type (OrderPlacedEvent, BalanceUpdateEvent, BridgeDepositEvent) shows correct type badge and summary text. Check no raw JSON or undefined labels.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail page — shows all transaction fields (type, digest, sender, timestamp, gas)
scenarios.description: After navigating to /explorer/tx/{digest}, verify the page renders: transaction type, full digest, sender address, timestamp, gas used, and status. All fields should be populated, not empty/zero.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — TX detail page shows hash, action/type, user address, time, fee (–); "User Address" label used for sender field

scenarios.title: Scale order — submit with valid price range and verify order placed
scenarios.description: After selecting Scale order type, fill in a valid Price Range (Low=60000, High=70000) and Number of Orders=5, set a size, then attempt to submit. Verify the order is placed or an appropriate error shown (not a JS crash).
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — "Scale" text in page comes from marketing OrderTypes component; trade form dropdown needs wallet connection to reveal order types

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — shows correct account summary (balance, positions count)
scenarios.description: On /explorer/address/{addr}, verify the account summary shows: wallet balance (USDC), number of active positions, and recent transaction count. Check data accuracy against known test wallet state.

scenarios.title: TWAP tab — can submit a new TWAP order with size and duration
scenarios.description: Click the TWAP tab in the bottom panel. Verify there is an input form to place a new TWAP order (size, duration). Fill in size=0.001 BTC, duration=1h and verify the submit button is present and enabled.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — TWAP text in page from marketing component + history tab; Order Type in form shows only "Limit" without wallet; cannot test TWAP creation without wallet

scenarios.title: Explorer search bar — search by wallet address navigates to address page
scenarios.description: Find the search bar on /explorer or /explorer/transactions. Enter the test wallet address and verify it navigates to /explorer/address/{addr} with correct account data.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — 'User Address' label should be 'Sender' for consistency
scenarios.description: TX detail page shows 'User Address' label; verify whether it should be labeled 'Sender' or 'From' as per Hyperliquid explorer conventions
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — "User Address" label on tx detail; should be "From" or "Sender" (issue #213)

scenarios.title: Order Type dropdown — verify Scale and TWAP options visible with connected wallet
scenarios.description: After wallet connect + enable trading, open Order Type dropdown and verify Scale and TWAP are available alongside Market/Limit/Stop
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Scale and TWAP options visible in order type dropdown with connected wallet

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — Fee field shows '–' for PlaceOrder; verify if fee should be populated
scenarios.description: TX detail page shows 'Fee: –' for PlaceOrder transactions. Verify whether fee should display a numerical value or '–' is correct for this tx type

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail page — loads with block/cp data
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/checkpoint/{seq} for a known checkpoint number; verify the page loads with timestamp, tx count, and validator info
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Checkpoint detail page loads with timestamp, tx count and tx list

scenarios.title: Explorer search bar — search by tx hash navigates to tx detail
scenarios.description: Use the Explorer search bar to type a known tx hash; verify it navigates to the correct tx detail page

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — label consistency: 'User Account' in checkpoint vs 'User Address' in tx detail
scenarios.description: After fixing E951 (User Address → From/Sender), verify label is consistent across explorer pages: checkpoint tx list, tx detail page, and address page all use the same field name.

scenarios.title: Scale order — Distribution mode: verify Top Heavy and Bottom Heavy produce different order size distributions
scenarios.description: Select Scale order type, fill price range, switch Distribution between Uniform/Top Heavy/Bottom Heavy and verify Order Preview shows different BTC amounts per order step.

scenarios.title: Scale order — invalid range validation: Start price >= End price should show error
scenarios.description: Set Scale Start price higher than End price (e.g., Start=68000, End=64000) and verify UI shows a validation error or disables the submit button.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — loads transaction history for a known wallet address
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{addr} for a known active wallet address, verify the page loads with transaction list and correct address display.

scenarios.title: Explorer — pagination: navigate to page 2 of transactions list
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, if there are multiple pages, click Next/page 2 and verify a different set of transactions loads without errors.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Explorer pagination fixed (PR #217): 20 txs on page 1, page 2 loads different 20 txs

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — verify URL query param updates on page change
scenarios.description: When paginating, check if URL updates to ?page=2 or similar. If URL doesn't change, browser back button won't work correctly.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — More button does not load additional transactions (stays at 10, no network requests)

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — last page shows partial/complete results correctly
scenarios.description: Navigate to the last page of transactions (e.g. page 11) and verify it loads valid transactions, not an empty list.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — 10 transactions shown with valid hashes, times, addresses; More button non-functional (E961)

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — Events section with non-zero count renders event items
scenarios.description: Found tx with Events (1) but event items not in standard table structure. Verify event data (type, fields) is visible in the events section.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — activity sections (positions, orders, history) render
scenarios.description: After searching for a wallet address, verify /explorer/address/{addr} shows at least one of: positions, open orders, trade history, funding payments.

scenarios.title: Explorer search — invalid/non-existent address shows helpful error
scenarios.description: Search with a syntactically valid but non-existent address (0x0000...0001). Expect a helpful 'address not found' or 'no activity' message rather than blank page.

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions More button — fix verification after repair
scenarios.description: Verify that after issue #215 fix, clicking More loads next 10 transactions and either updates URL query param or preserves scroll state via cursor/offset.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — More button still does not load additional transactions (issue #215 open, fix not deployed)

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — filter by type (PlaceOrder) shows only filtered results
scenarios.description: Click the 'Filter: All Types' dropdown and select 'PlaceOrder'. Verify the transaction list only shows PlaceOrder type transactions.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — verify 'Transactions' count matches actual list length
scenarios.description: On a checkpoint detail page, the header shows 'Transactions: N'. Verify the number N matches the actual number of transaction rows displayed below.

scenarios.title: Trade header stats — mark price matches oracle price within 1% tolerance
scenarios.description: On /trade page, read '标记价格' (mark price) and '预言机价格' (oracle price). Verify |mark - oracle| / oracle < 1%. Large divergence could indicate stale data.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — shows transaction history for a known address
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/0x73a6b3c3...80adc0 (oracle keeper address visible in transactions). Verify address page loads and shows transactions, not empty.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — transaction type filtering
scenarios.description: On /explorer/address/{addr} page, verify if there is a filter for transaction types (FillEvent, FundingPaymentEvent, etc.) and that filtering works correctly.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — Fee field shows actual value (not dash)
scenarios.description: For PlaceOrder and other user action txs, verify Fee field shows actual fee amount with units, not '–'. Currently Fee shows '–' for PlaceOrder transactions.

scenarios.title: Trade — Stop Market order type selection and form fields
scenarios.description: After selecting Stop Market from order type dropdown, verify the form shows trigger price field and that the order can be placed (or shows appropriate validation).

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — More button network request inspection
scenarios.description: Intercept network requests when clicking More button on /explorer/transactions. Verify if API request is made, check request params (cursor/offset), and diagnose why response doesn't update the list.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Pagination works via arrow buttons; More is nav dropdown, list updates on next click

scenarios.title: Trade — Scale order type fields and validation
scenarios.description: After selecting Scale from order type dropdown, verify the form shows scale-specific fields (price range, number of orders), and validate the fields work correctly.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — Fee field for user-action transactions (Deposit/Withdraw)
scenarios.description: Check if Fee field shows value for user-action txs (Deposit, Withdraw, PlaceOrder) — not just oracle updates. Filter transactions to find one, open detail, verify Fee has numeric value.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx filter — type filter dropdown functionality
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, use the 'Filter: All Types' dropdown to select 'PlaceOrder'. Verify list updates to show only PlaceOrder transactions. Then switch to 'Deposit' filter.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — transactions listed within checkpoint
scenarios.description: Open /explorer/checkpoint/{seq} for a checkpoint that has transactions (Events > 0). Verify the transaction list inside checkpoint is populated and tx links work.

scenarios.title: Explorer address detail page — recent transactions and balance display
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{addr} using a known address from the tx list. Verify page shows: address, balance (if any), recent transactions. Check for any empty states or errors.

scenarios.title: Explorer search — search by transaction hash from header search bar
scenarios.description: Use the search bar in the Explorer header to search for a known valid transaction hash. Verify it navigates to the correct /explorer/tx/ detail page. Also test searching for an address.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Explorer search bar navigates to /explorer/tx/ and /explorer/address/ correctly

scenarios.title: TP/SL — auto-calculation fails for Market orders without midPrice loaded
scenarios.description: Enable TP/SL on a Market order (no price input). The entryPrice falls back to midPrice. Wait for market data to load, then enter TP price and verify TP% auto-calculates. Expected: works when midPrice > 0. Known: fails if market data not yet loaded.

scenarios.title: IOC order — verify order expires immediately if no match (order history check)
scenarios.description: Place a Limit IOC order with a price far from market (e.g., $1 for BTC). IOC should cancel immediately if not filled. Check order history shows the order with Cancelled status or IOC flag. This validates the TIF is actually sent to backend.

scenarios.title: ALO (Add Liquidity Only) order — selection and submission attempt
scenarios.description: Click GTC dropdown, select ALO (Add Liquidity Only / Post-Only). Verify ALO label appears in form header. Fill in a limit price and size. Submit order. Verify order is accepted or correctly rejected if it would be a taker (price crosses book).

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — search for wallet address shows transaction history
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{walletAddress}. Verify the page shows transaction history for that address. Check that each tx row has: digest, type, timestamp, status. Verify pagination if more than 10 txs. Check that clicking a tx digest navigates to /explorer/tx/.

scenarios.title: Reduce Only — submit order with Reduce Only when no position exists
scenarios.description: Connect wallet (no open position), enable Reduce Only checkbox, fill order form, click submit. Expected: order rejected with error like "No position to reduce" or similar. Bug if order is silently accepted without position. Wallet connection required.

scenarios.title: TP/SL toggle state restoration — verify behavior when switching order types with TP/SL enabled
scenarios.description: Pre-enable TP/SL on Limit form, set TP=55000 SL=45000. Switch to Stop Limit (which also should support TP/SL). Verify toggle remains on. Switch to Market. Verify toggle goes off with visible warning/message. Switch back to Limit. Verify toggle is restored. Tests issue #218 fix.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — TP/SL correctly hidden on Market, toggle available on Limit

scenarios.title: TP/SL inputs — verify placeholder/label text and input validation
scenarios.description: Enable TP/SL on Limit form. Identify which inputs are TP and which are SL (check labels/placeholders). Enter invalid values (TP below current price for long, SL above current price). Verify inline validation errors appear. Verify form blocks submission with invalid TP/SL.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint page — transaction count display and Status column presence
scenarios.description: For checkpoint #296405, verify: (1) Transaction count/header shows correct count, (2) 'Status' column is absent or present (document current state for issue #163 reference). Also test checkpoint with 0 txs and one with >10 txs to check rendering differences.

scenarios.title: Order Type Stop Limit — full form interaction test
scenarios.description: Select Stop Limit order type. Verify: (1) form shows Trigger Price field in addition to Price and Amount, (2) TP/SL is available, (3) entering values and switching back to Limit preserves or properly resets fields. Document all fields visible on Stop Limit form.

scenarios.title: Order Type Stop Market — verify trigger price and execution behavior
scenarios.description: Select Stop Market order type. Verify: (1) only Trigger Price + Amount fields shown (no Price), (2) can submit order (test if submission triggers expected behavior). Related to existing issue about Stop Market BUY trigger price validation.

scenarios.title: Reduce Only checkbox — toggleable and affects order submission
scenarios.description: On Limit order form, click the Reduce Only checkbox. Verify it becomes checked. Then submit a limit order with Reduce Only checked. Verify the order submission includes reduce_only=true in the API payload.

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions page — pagination works correctly
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, load the page and verify that pagination controls (next/prev or infinite scroll) work. Navigate to page 2 and verify different transactions are shown.

scenarios.title: TP/SL inputs — enter values and verify they appear in order confirmation
scenarios.description: On Limit form, enable TP/SL toggle. Enter TP=55000 SL=45000. Click Buy/Long. Verify order confirmation dialog shows the TP/SL values. Related to issue #218 fix verification.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — requires wallet authentication to activate TP/SL form inputs and order confirmation

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — shows correct user transaction history
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{WALLET_ADDR} for the test wallet. Verify the page loads and shows transaction history. Check that transaction types (PlaceOrder, CancelOrder etc.) are correctly labeled.

scenarios.title: Stop Limit order type — form shows correct fields (trigger price + limit price)
scenarios.description: Select Stop Limit order type from the trade form. Verify the form shows both a Trigger Price field and a Limit Price field (distinct from Market which shows only price). Verify both inputs accept numeric values.

scenarios.title: Leverage tick labels: verify fix — clicking 25x actually sets 25x
scenarios.description: After fix for E716: open leverage dialog, click 25x tick label, verify slider moves to 25 (range 1-50), Confirm saves 25x to leverage button.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — Slider stays at 0 after clicking 25x tick, fix for #220 not yet deployed

scenarios.title: TP/SL inputs: verify visible after toggle with connected wallet
scenarios.description: With pre-injected wallet session, open trade form (Limit), click TP/SL toggle. Verify: TP and SL input fields appear. Enter TP=55000 SL=45000. Verify inputs hold values.

scenarios.title: Explorer pagination: verify disabled Previous button on page 1
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions page 1, verify Previous/Left pagination button is disabled. Navigate to page 2, verify Previous becomes enabled. Navigate back to page 1, verify Previous disabled again.

scenarios.title: Leverage dialog: verify slider drag with mouse updates displayed value in real-time
scenarios.description: Open leverage dialog. Drag slider from current position to 30x. Verify the leverage value preview inside the dialog updates in real-time as you drag (not just on release). Confirm saves 30x.

scenarios.title: Explorer filter: filter by 'PlaceOrder' type shows only PlaceOrder transactions
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, select 'PlaceOrder' from the Filter dropdown. Verify all visible transaction rows show Type='PlaceOrder'. Navigate to page 2 and verify filter persists.

scenarios.title: Leverage dialog — verify 25x tick updates slider value correctly after fix lands
scenarios.description: Re-test after PR for issue #220 merges: open leverage dialog (via leverage button in trade form), click 25x tick label, verify slider value becomes 25, Confirm button saves 25x.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — 25x tick click does NOT update slider (slider stays at 0). Issue #220 still present.

scenarios.title: Leverage dialog — verify all tick labels (1x/13x/38x/50x) update slider correctly
scenarios.description: In leverage dialog, sequentially click each tick label (1x, 13x, 38x, 50x) and verify slider moves to correct value each time. Tests complete tick label functionality.

scenarios.title: Explorer search — address with mixed case characters normalizes and navigates correctly
scenarios.description: Enter a valid Sui address with some uppercase hex characters. Verify search normalizes (lowercases) the address and navigates to correct address detail page.

scenarios.title: Explorer address detail page — balance and transactions load correctly
scenarios.description: After navigating to /explorer/address/{addr} via search, verify: (a) address displayed in header, (b) SUI balance field shows numeric value or zero, (c) transactions list renders or shows empty state.

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — accessible and functional after wallet connection (inject session state)
scenarios.description: Use full session cookie injection (wagmi + approveAgent signature flow) to reach authenticated portfolio state. Open withdraw modal, verify amount input renders, test balance validation with amount exceeding 0 balance.

scenarios.title: Leverage dialog — verify other tick labels (1x, 13x, 38x, 50x) also unclickable
scenarios.description: E1001 confirms 25x tick unclickable (issue #220 open). Test remaining tick labels to verify full scope: click 1x tick — does slider go to 1? click 50x — does slider go to 50? Helps quantify how many ticks are broken.

scenarios.title: Reduce-Only checkbox: hidden on Market order, visible only on Limit
scenarios.description: DOM inspection (E723) found input[id='reduce-only'] visible. Verify: on Market tab the Reduce-Only checkbox is hidden; on Limit tab it is visible. Related to open issue about Reduce Only showing on Market orders.

scenarios.title: Order book best bid/ask populated and near mark price
scenarios.description: E722 found 0 order book rows via CSS selectors. Inspect order book component DOM directly: find rows with aria-label or correct class names. Verify bid rows are red/green colored, ask price > bid price, and spread value matches computed bid-ask difference.

scenarios.title: TWAP form fields: interval and number-of-orders inputs fillable with validation
scenarios.description: E721 confirmed TWAP tab renders with TWAP CSS class elements. Go deeper: identify the Interval input and Number-of-Orders input. Enter valid values (e.g. interval=5min, orders=5) and invalid values (0, negative). Confirm validation messages appear for invalid input.

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal: opens, shows available balance, input validation
scenarios.description: WithdrawModal.tsx was recently changed. Open portfolio page, click Withdraw button, verify modal opens with correct available balance displayed. Try entering amount > balance — confirm error. Try entering 0 or negative — confirm blocked.

scenarios.title: Order book colors — verify asks red/bids green via CSS variable rendering
scenarios.description: E497 confirmed order book structure correct (asks in flex-col-reverse, bids in normal order), but color detection failed. Verify via screenshot analysis or CSS variable inspection that asks show red/orange and bids show green. Check --color-sell and --color-buy CSS variables are applied to rows.

scenarios.title: Leverage modal preset buttons — verify as div/span elements not button
scenarios.description: E730 found leverage modal opens (slider present, Close works) but preset buttons (1x/13x/25x/38x/50x) not found as button elements. Verify they exist as div/span with click handlers. Check if clicking a preset value updates the slider position numerically.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — BridgeDeposit tx detail page loads correctly
scenarios.description: E816 found 3 transactions on address page including BridgeDepositEvent (0xa699af...1ac9, #12158). Click the tx hash link and verify detail page shows correct fields: Action=BridgeDeposit, Amount=500000000 USDC, checkpoint, timestamp.

scenarios.title: Cross to Isolated margin switch — confirm isolated margin fields appear
scenarios.description: E729 confirmed Cross/Isolated toggle exists and clicking Cross activates Isolated. Now verify when Isolated mode is active: specific isolated margin fields appear (e.g. margin allocation input), leverage restriction notice, and switching back to Cross restores original form.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — Cross/Isolated margin toggle not visible on testnet

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — OrderPlaced cancelled tx Show Details expander
scenarios.description: E816 found OrderPlacedEvent with [+] expand button. Click [+] to expand 'Show details' for the cancelled BTC-USDC Buy order, verify raw event data is displayed (JSON or formatted event fields like price=50000, size=0.001, isBuy=true).

scenarios.title: Leverage slider default value — verify initial value matches displayed leverage
scenarios.description: Open leverage modal from trade form. Immediately check the range slider value before any interaction. It should match the displayed leverage (e.g. if '10x' button shows, slider should be at 10, not 0). Regression from E731 observation where slider showed 0.

scenarios.title: API keys page — authorize agent wallet with connected wallet signature
scenarios.description: Navigate to /api-keys with approveAgent pre-authorized. Check if the 'Add' button appears and triggers signing flow. After adding, verify the session wallet address appears in the list and can be toggled on/off.

scenarios.title: Explorer /explorer/transactions page — pagination and row count
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/transactions. Verify the page loads a table of transactions, pagination controls are present, and navigating to page 2 loads different rows without JS error. Explorer area had recent git changes.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — /explorer/address/{addr} renders account data
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{WALLET_ADDR}. Verify the page renders the address header, shows balance/perp/portfolio sections, no JS errors. Explorer address page had recent git changes.

scenarios.title: Leverage slider — confirm Confirm button saves new value
scenarios.description: Complement to E731: open leverage modal, move slider from 10x to 20x, click Confirm (not Close). Verify the trade form now shows '20x' and the value persists when order form re-renders.

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — verify amount/address inputs and submit
scenarios.description: After fixing E738 (Withdraw button bug), verify the modal opens with: amount input accepting numeric value, SUI address input, submit button becomes enabled with valid inputs. Confirm actual withdrawal transaction is initiated.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — Withdraw button navigates to Withdraw History tab instead of opening modal

scenarios.title: API Keys — Authorize with valid name and address inputs
scenarios.description: Fill in API wallet name and address in /api-keys form, then click Authorize API Wallet. Verify EIP-712 signature dialog appears, after signing the new wallet appears in the list with correct name/address/expiry.

scenarios.title: API Keys — Remove existing API wallet
scenarios.description: On /api-keys page with an existing API wallet in the list, click the Remove button. Verify confirmation dialog appears (if any), and after confirming, the wallet is removed from the list.

scenarios.title: API Keys — Generate button creates a new API wallet keypair
scenarios.description: On /api-keys page, click the Generate button. Verify it auto-fills the Address field with a new generated wallet address, and optionally auto-fills a name. The address should be a valid Ethereum address.

scenarios.title: Orderbook — real-time updates: new order appears without page reload
scenarios.description: Open the orderbook on /trade/BTC-USDC. Wait 10-15 seconds. Capture orderbook state at t=0 and t=15s. Verify some price level quantities or new rows appear/disappear, confirming live WebSocket updates are working.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — verify Number of Orders calculation with 1h/10s (360 orders)
scenarios.description: Set TWAP duration to 1h, interval to 10s, size to 0.001 BTC. TWAP Order Preview should show Number of Orders = 360, Size per Suborder = 0.001/360 BTC. Submit and verify order appears in TWAP trailing list.

scenarios.title: Order book — bid side cumulative size column accuracy
scenarios.description: Verify bid side cumulative size column is also monotonically decreasing (from spread outward). E739 only validated ask side. Bids should be: row1_size, row1+row2, etc.

scenarios.title: Portfolio Deposit button — verify opens deposit modal (not Deposit History tab)
scenarios.description: The Withdraw button is known to navigate to Withdraw History tab instead of modal (open issue). Test if Deposit button has same issue — click Deposit button on portfolio assets row and verify deposit modal opens (not Deposit History tab).

scenarios.title: TWAP form — Randomize checkbox changes Frequency display to range format
scenarios.description: When Randomize checkbox is checked, the Frequency display in TWAP Order Preview should change from fixed interval (e.g. '10s') to range format (e.g. '5-15s'). Verify this UI update occurs immediately on checkbox change.

scenarios.title: TP/SL inputs — enter values and verify gain/loss percentage auto-calculates
scenarios.description: E741 confirmed aria-labels are present. Now verify functional behavior: enter TP Price (e.g. 70000 when BTC is ~66000), verify gain percentage input auto-calculates (~6%). Enter SL Price (e.g. 63000), verify loss percentage (~4.5%). Both fields should be bidirectionally linked.

scenarios.title: /markets funding rate tooltip — clarify 4h vs hourly rate
scenarios.description: Hover over the funding rate column on /markets. Check if there is a tooltip explaining whether the rate shown is per-8h, per-4h, or annualized. Compare with /trade page label which says '预测资金费'. Both pages should have clear tooltips or labels explaining the rate period.
scenarios.result_summary: FAIL — No tooltip on funding rate cell/header to clarify rate period (4h vs hourly)

scenarios.title: Footer Docs link — verify fix after issue #226
scenarios.description: After fix for issue #226, verify footer Docs link has target=_blank and opens in a new tab. Also verify all other footer text links (Privacy, Terms) open correctly.

scenarios.title: Reduce Only order — verify API payload contains reduce_only flag
scenarios.description: With an open position, enable Reduce Only checkbox, fill order size less than open position, submit. Intercept the network request to /exchange and verify the order payload contains reduce_only=true or equivalent field.

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — valid address submission flow
scenarios.description: Enter a valid Ethereum address in the withdraw modal, enter a small USDC amount, click Withdraw. Verify: (1) no premature error message, (2) transaction confirmation or error from backend appears, (3) Withdraw History tab shows the pending withdrawal.

scenarios.title: /markets page — spot markets tab presence and data
scenarios.description: Recent git changes added app/spot/page.tsx. Check if /markets or /spot shows a spot markets section. Navigate to /spot and verify: page loads, shows spot pairs or appropriate empty state, no console errors.

scenarios.title: /markets funding rate — compare displayed value with raw API response
scenarios.description: Fetch /api/v1/markets or equivalent endpoint, compare raw fundingRate field with displayed value in /markets table. Verify if displayed is 1h, 4h, or 8h rate. Expected: should match Hyperliquid convention (8h).

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — verify all tx types shown (system vs user actions)
scenarios.description: Oracle price updater (0x73a6b3c3...80adc0) appears many times on All Transactions but shows only 1 tx on its address page. Verify if the address page intentionally filters out system transactions (UpdateOraclePrices) and only shows user actions.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — 'Show details' JSON for OrderPlacedEvent completeness
scenarios.description: For an OrderPlacedEvent, click Show details and verify JSON fields are complete and correct (perpetualId, coin, orderId, side, price, quantity, status). Compare with what's shown in the Summary column.

scenarios.title: Explorer search — verify tx hash (0x+64hex) search routes to /explorer/tx/ (regression test for #186)
scenarios.description: Issue #186 was about tx hash search always routing to /explorer/address/ instead of /explorer/tx/. Verify if this is fixed by entering a known full tx hash in the explorer search bar.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — filter/pagination for address activity list
scenarios.description: On /explorer/address/{addr}, verify if the activity list supports pagination or filtering by event type (OrderPlacedEvent, BalanceUpdateEvent, BridgeDepositEvent). Check if 'View All' or Load More works.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — PlaceOrder tx shows order details (side, price, size, pair)
scenarios.description: On /explorer/tx/{PlaceOrderHash}, verify that order details (Buy/Sell, BTC-USDC, price, size) are shown in Transaction Details section, not just 'PlaceOrder' action label.

scenarios.title: Oracle/mark price divergence threshold — UI behavior at 1%+ divergence
scenarios.description: Currently oracle=66793.7 vs mark=66219.4 (0.87% diverge). Monitor over time to see if UI adds any warning when divergence exceeds 1%. Also check if the oracle price value refreshes in real-time (should update without page reload).

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — shows all transactions in the checkpoint
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/checkpoint/{N}. Verify: checkpoint metadata (time, tx count, sequence), list of transactions with type+hash links, ability to click through to tx details.

scenarios.title: /markets vs /trade funding rate discrepancy — verify after issue #225 fix
scenarios.description: Regression test for issue #225. After fix is deployed, verify /markets 资金费率 and /trade 预测资金费 show consistent values (or clearly labeled as current vs predicted with explanation).

scenarios.title: Crossed orderbook badge tooltip — hover shows correct warning text
scenarios.description: When orderbook is crossed, the "Crossed" badge (from fix #201) should display tooltip "Ask price is lower than bid price — crossed order book detected" on hover. Verify title attribute matches expected text.

scenarios.title: TP/SL — TP validates against limit price (not mark price) for Limit orders
scenarios.description: For a Limit BUY order with limit price X, entering TP below X should trigger error "TP must be above entry price". Verify the validation uses the limit price as reference, not the current mark price.

scenarios.title: Orderbook spread numeric value matches best ask minus best bid
scenarios.description: Extract the displayed spread value from the orderbook and verify it equals (bestAsk - bestBid). Also verify it shows as positive percentage. Cross-check with actual bid/ask row prices visible in the orderbook.

scenarios.title: Spot trading page renders and shows correct token pairs
scenarios.description: Navigate to /spot page (recently modified in app/spot/page.tsx). Verify the page loads, displays spot trading pairs, order form is visible, and no console errors. Recently changed file warrants regression check.

scenarios.title: Markets page post-update — all columns render and sort correctly
scenarios.description: Navigate to /markets page (app/markets/page.tsx recently changed). Verify: table renders with correct columns (Symbol, Price, 24h Change, Volume, Funding Rate, OI), sorting by column works, no blank cells.

scenarios.title: Orderbook — bid/ask background fill color proportional to order size
scenarios.description: The orderbook rows show bid/ask colored bars indicating volume depth. Verify the background fill width is proportional to the quantity of each row (larger qty = wider bar). E762 confirmed color coding is correct; this verifies depth visualization.

scenarios.title: Explorer — PlaceOrder tx: all 20 OrderPlacedEvents render with correct price/direction
scenarios.description: E765 confirmed Show details works. Now verify: (1) all 20 events are listed, (2) Buy/Sell direction labels match the price direction (Buy < mid, Sell > mid), (3) event index #0 #2 #4... are shown correctly.

scenarios.title: /markets — sort by 24h 涨跌 (change) column toggles asc/desc
scenarios.description: E766 verified Price sort. Now verify 24h 涨跌 column: initial state ↕, first click → ↓ or ↑, second click toggles direction. Currently shows +0.00% so direction may not be visually apparent but arrow should change.

scenarios.title: /markets — 持仓量 (OI) column sort toggle works correctly
scenarios.description: Verify 持仓量 column sort: ↕ → ↓ → ↑. E766 confirmed price sort works; verify OI sort as parallel test for market table sorting completeness.

scenarios.title: Explorer — UpdateOraclePrices tx: verify event data expanded correctly
scenarios.description: Most testnet txs are UpdateOraclePrices. Navigate to such a tx and check: (1) events section lists oracle price events, (2) Show details reveals price update data, (3) data is non-empty and parseable.

scenarios.title: /markets — Other columns (Price, 24h Change, OI) sort toggle works correctly
scenarios.description: Verify that clicking Price, 24h Change, and Open Interest column headers properly toggles ↕ → ↓ → ↑ sort direction. E767 showed Volume is broken; test adjacent columns.

scenarios.title: /markets — sort order persists after page navigation and return
scenarios.description: Navigate away from /markets (e.g. to /trade) then back. Verify sort column and direction are preserved (or reset to default consistently).

scenarios.title: TP/SL — entering 0 or negative value shows validation error
scenarios.description: On trade form with TP/SL enabled, enter 0 or negative number in TP or SL field. Expect validation error. Tests boundary values beyond direction-specific validation.

scenarios.title: TP/SL — values persist after switching order type (Market ↔ Limit)
scenarios.description: Enable TP/SL on Market order, enter values, switch to Limit. Verify TP/SL values either persist correctly or are reset. Switch back to Market and verify consistent behavior.

scenarios.title: API Keys page — create new API key flow end-to-end
scenarios.description: With connected wallet session, navigate to /api-keys. Verify the page renders key list and create UI. Click 'Create Key', fill in name, confirm. Verify newly created key appears in list.

scenarios.title: Stop Market order — trigger price field only (no limit price)
scenarios.description: Select Stop Market order type. Verify only one price field is shown (trigger/stop price), not two. Market executes at market price once trigger hits.

scenarios.title: TWAP order form — interval and number of parts fields visible
scenarios.description: Select TWAP order type. Verify form shows interval duration input and number-of-parts/splits input in addition to amount.

scenarios.title: API Keys — Remove button removes wallet from list
scenarios.description: With existing API wallet in list, click Remove. Verify confirmation prompt or direct removal. After removal, wallet should no longer appear in list.

scenarios.title: Scale order — price range and parts fields visible
scenarios.description: Select Scale order type. Verify form shows min price, max price, and number of orders fields to define the scaling range.

scenarios.title: Order Type selector — Scalp order type renders correctly
scenarios.description: Select Scalp order type from order type dropdown. Verify form renders without JS errors and shows expected fields (price + amount at minimum).

scenarios.title: Portfolio ?address= param — valid address shows that address's portfolio (not connected wallet)
scenarios.description: Visit /portfolio?address=0x<some-other-valid-eth-address>. Verify the page shows that external address's data, not the connected wallet's data. Currently E773 found that connected wallet data overrides the ?address= param.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — epoch field display and timestamp value accuracy
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/checkpoint/{recent_seq}. Verify that epoch number is displayed (E781 found it absent for old checkpoint 4123741), and timestamp shows actual datetime (E781 showed '–'). Use a more recent checkpoint seq.

scenarios.title: Markets table — verify sortable columns and sort toggle behavior
scenarios.description: Load /markets and inspect table header structure. Identify which columns are sortable (if any). Click sortable headers and verify ascending/descending toggle works. Related to open issue: 24h Volume sort indicator stuck at ↓.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — verify Action, UserAccount, Summary fields render correctly
scenarios.description: After E780 confirmed routing to /explorer/tx/{hash}, verify the content: Action type, User Account (linked to address page), and Summary fields are all rendered with correct data (not empty/undefined).

scenarios.title: Explorer search — checkpoint number routes to /explorer/checkpoint/
scenarios.description: Enter a checkpoint sequence number (e.g. 4123741) in Explorer search. Verify it routes to /explorer/checkpoint/{seq} (not tx or address page). Complements E780 (tx hash) and verifies the search correctly disambiguates input types.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — form submission with insufficient balance shows error
scenarios.description: Select TWAP order type, fill duration and amount, click submit with 0 balance — verify informative error message (not silent failure)

scenarios.title: TWAP tab panel — verify column headers and empty state message
scenarios.description: Click TWAP tab in bottom panel (not the order type), verify table shows correct columns (Status, Amount, Duration, Progress) and shows 'No TWAP orders' empty state

scenarios.title: Order type Scale — form fields visible and functional
scenarios.description: Select Scale order type from dropdown, verify form shows scale-specific fields (price range, number of orders), check field behavior

scenarios.title: Send internal transfer — verify disabled state and messaging
scenarios.description: Open Withdraw modal, click Send tab, verify 'Internal transfer (not yet available)' label is shown and submit button is disabled (not silently broken)

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal MAX button — fills correct available balance
scenarios.description: With positive USDC balance, click MAX button in Withdraw modal, verify amount field fills with exact available balance amount

scenarios.title: Order History tab — shows empty state when no orders placed
scenarios.description: Click Order History tab in bottom panel; expect empty state message like 'No order history.'

scenarios.title: Funding History tab — shows empty state when no funding payments
scenarios.description: Click Funding History tab; expect empty state message like 'No funding history.'

scenarios.title: Positions tab — empty state message when no open positions
scenarios.description: Positions(0) tab should show 'No positions' or equivalent empty state

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — MAX button fills correct available balance with connected wallet
scenarios.description: Requires real wallet connection with testnet deposits. MAX button should fill input with exact available USDC balance shown.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Withdraw modal MAX button exists, available 0.00 USDC (testnet), amount input behavior correct

scenarios.title: API Keys page — shows connect wallet prompt when not authenticated
scenarios.description: Navigate to /api-keys without wallet; should show a connect wallet button or prompt, not a blank/broken page

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — Send mode address validation rejects invalid format
scenarios.description: In Withdraw modal, switch to Send tab, enter malformed address (e.g. 'abc123'), verify error message appears and Send button stays disabled

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — coin selector dropdown lists available coins
scenarios.description: Open Withdraw modal, click 'Select Coin' dropdown, verify it shows a list of available coins (at least USDC), and selection updates displayed coin

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — 'Show details' expands event details
scenarios.description: On a transaction detail page (/explorer/tx/{hash}), click the 'Show details' button on an event row and verify it expands to show additional event data

scenarios.title: API Keys — Remove wallet action triggers confirmation UI
scenarios.description: On API Keys page, find an existing API wallet entry, click Remove/Delete action, verify a confirmation dialog or inline confirmation appears before deletion

scenarios.title: Order Book — switch to Trades tab shows recent fills
scenarios.description: On trade page, find the Order Book panel, click 'Trades' tab, verify it switches view and shows recent trade data (price, size, time)
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — Trades tab switches correctly, shows recent fills with price/amount/time data

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — Send mode: confirm button enabled for valid ETH address
scenarios.description: Open WithdrawModal in Send mode. Enter a valid Ethereum address (0x1234...abcd format, 42 chars). Verify the confirm/send button becomes enabled. Follow-up to E784 which tested invalid address.

scenarios.title: Order Book — Trades tab: verify color coding of buys vs sells
scenarios.description: After switching to Trades tab in Order Book panel, verify that buy fills are shown in green and sell fills in red (or a clear color distinction), and that Price/Amount/Time columns are properly labeled.

scenarios.title: Markets page — default sort column is 24h Volume descending on page load
scenarios.description: Navigate to /markets fresh (no prior interaction). Verify which column is the default sort column and direction. Currently observed: 24h成交量 shows ↓ by default. Verify this is consistent across page reloads.

scenarios.title: API Keys page — displays existing API wallets list when connected
scenarios.description: Navigate to /api-keys while wallet is connected via proper session. Verify the page shows: existing API wallet list (address, name, valid-until), status indicators, and Remove/Reveal buttons. This tests the read-only view of the API keys page.

scenarios.title: Withdraw modal — Send: actual address input field visible and functional after Send tab click
scenarios.description: Verify the full Send tab UI after clicking: 1) address input (0x... placeholder) visible, 2) amount input visible, 3) coin selector shows USDC/ETH options. Regression test since WithdrawModal.tsx was recently changed.
scenarios.result_summary: SKIP — Cannot test Withdraw/Send modal without DEX Account balance; Deposit modal only accessible

scenarios.title: Order Book — rapid tab switching does not cause data flicker or blank state
scenarios.description: Switch between Order Book and Trades tabs 5 times rapidly (< 500ms each). Verify no blank flicker, no JS errors in console, and final state shows correct data.

scenarios.title: Explorer — /explorer page loads and shows recent transactions list
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/transactions. Verify: 1) page loads without error, 2) transaction list renders with digest/type/time columns, 3) clicking a transaction row navigates to /explorer/tx/[digest]. Recently changed in git.

scenarios.title: Markets page — /markets loads and displays available trading pairs
scenarios.description: Navigate to /markets. Verify: 1) page loads (recently changed), 2) trading pairs list renders, 3) each row shows pair name, price, 24h change. Test sorting by change %.

scenarios.title: Spot trading page — /spot loads and renders spot trading interface
scenarios.description: Navigate to /spot (recently changed file: app/spot/page.tsx). Verify: 1) page loads without blank/error, 2) spot trading UI visible (order form or market selector), 3) no console errors.

scenarios.title: Privacy and Terms pages — /privacy and /terms render correctly
scenarios.description: Recently changed files: app/privacy/page.tsx, app/terms/page.tsx. Navigate to both. Verify: 1) pages load without error, 2) content renders (not blank), 3) back navigation works.

scenarios.title: Nav social icons — aria-label fix verification
scenarios.description: After fix for Issue #234, verify that aria-label attributes are present on all 3 social icon links (Twitter/X, Discord, Telegram) in both desktop nav and mobile menu. Check each link has aria-label='Twitter / X', aria-label='Discord', aria-label='Telegram'.

scenarios.title: Portfolio Transaction History — verify with active trade history
scenarios.description: After placing and filling at least one order (or using a wallet with fill history), navigate to Portfolio → Transaction History tab and verify: (1) rows appear with correct pair, price, amount, status, (2) pagination appears if >20 fills, (3) check that PASS/PARTIAL_FILL/CANCELLED status labels render correctly.

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — expand event 'Show details' reveals event data
scenarios.description: On a TX detail page with events (e.g. /explorer/tx/0xb6e97f...), click 'Show details' button on an event row. Verify the detail panel expands showing raw event fields and values. Check that BridgeDepositEvent shows amount/USDC fields and OrderPlacedEvent shows order parameters.

scenarios.title: Explorer search — searching by wallet address routes to /explorer/address/{addr}
scenarios.description: In the Explorer search bar, enter a valid SUI wallet address (0x94bd399ad5c05f9237c806c6dc8353ed5bd66a93bdf7c6f8346e6b191287c27c). Press Enter or click search. Verify it routes to /explorer/address/{addr} and shows the Address Activity page.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — user address link from TX detail navigates back to address
scenarios.description: On TX detail page, the 'User Address' field shows a truncated address (0x73a6b3c3...80adc0). Verify it is clickable and routes to /explorer/address/{full_addr}. This tests bidirectional linking between TX and address pages.

scenarios.title: Explorer checkpoint detail — shows transaction list with correct count
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/checkpoint/1 and verify it shows the checkpoint detail page with a list of transactions and their count badge.

scenarios.title: Explorer address page — shows transaction history for known wallet address
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{known_addr} and verify the page shows transaction history rows, not empty state.

scenarios.title: Markets page — funding rate negative values show '-' sign correctly
scenarios.description: On /markets, verify that negative funding rates are displayed with a '-' prefix and red color indicator.

scenarios.title: Trade page slug routing — /trade/BTC-USDC loads correct pair
scenarios.description: Navigate to /trade/BTC-USDC (slug path) and verify chart and order form load with BTC-USDC selected.
scenarios.result_summary: PASS — /trade/BTC-USDC redirects to /trade?coin=BTC (by design); correct coin extracted and loaded

scenarios.title: Explorer tx detail — PlaceOrder event shows maker/taker fields
scenarios.description: Find a PlaceOrder transaction in explorer and verify the Events section shows maker, taker, price, quantity fields.

scenarios.title: Trade page invalid coin param — /trade?coin=INVALID fallback behavior
scenarios.description: Navigate to /trade?coin=INVALID and verify the page falls back to default pair or shows an error, not a broken UI

scenarios.title: Explorer address page for address with known transactions
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/address/{addr} for an address known to have transactions on testnet; verify transaction history list renders

scenarios.title: Trade slug multiple valid markets — /trade/SOL-USDC and /trade/ARB-USDC routing
scenarios.description: Test slug routing for multiple market pairs beyond BTC-USDC; verify correct coin extracted and loaded for each

scenarios.title: Open Orders tab loading state timeout — spinner shown while fetching, not indefinite
scenarios.description: After clicking Open Orders tab, verify loading spinner appears briefly then resolves (either shows orders or empty state), not stuck loading

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions page — pagination controls visible and functional
scenarios.description: Navigate to /explorer/transactions and verify transaction list renders with pagination; clicking next page loads new transactions

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — rows-per-page selector changes displayed count
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, click the rows-per-page control to select 20 or 50 rows, verify the table updates to show more transactions without a full page reload.

scenarios.title: Explorer transactions — filter by PlaceOrder type shows only PlaceOrder rows
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, open the Type filter dropdown and select 'PlaceOrder'. Verify all visible rows show Type=PlaceOrder and no other types appear.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — input validation for interval (non-numeric, zero, negative)
scenarios.description: On TWAP tab, enter invalid values in the interval field: empty string, 0, -1, 'abc'. Verify each triggers an inline validation error and the place order button is disabled.

scenarios.title: TWAP order — place order requires wallet connection (shows connect prompt)
scenarios.description: On TWAP tab without wallet, fill in quantity and interval, click the Place Order button. Verify user is prompted to connect wallet rather than silently failing or throwing an error.

scenarios.title: Explorer — clicking a transaction row navigates to tx detail page
scenarios.description: On /explorer/transactions, click on a transaction hash or row. Verify navigation to /explorer/tx/[digest] detail page showing transaction details (type, sender, checkpoint, actions).
